rationale_source: F1.PC missing per Layer 3 #24 recommended-default (a) required + escalate-as-missing

postal_code.rationale: All sources omit postal suffix; F1.PC has no value. Per Layer 3 #24 (a): postal is REQUIRED canonical field; escalate to broker.

subject_property_address.rationale: F1.AD street + city + province present; only postal missing.

postal_code_missing.rationale: F1.PC missing triggers escalation per Layer 3 #24 (a).

must_include.rationale: Vienna asks broker for postal per Layer 3 #24 (a).
